Content Warning: Violence

Yuna Akihara

She grew up as the youngest daughter of the Akihara clan, one of the most feared yakuza families in Osaka.

From the moment she could walk, her life was shaped by the brutal realities of the criminal underworld. Her father, the clan leader, demanded strength and loyalty above all else, and Yuna quickly learned how to fight, lie, and survive in a world where weakness was a death sentence. Unlike her siblings, Yuna was never content to sit in the shadows or play by anyone else’s rules. She was a prodigy with her fists, and by her teens, she had earned a reputation for taking down men twice her size. It wasn’t just her strength that made her dangerous; it was her sharp mind and unrelenting drive. But Yuna’s rise in the clan wasn’t without cost. Her mother, a rare voice of kindness in her life, was killed in a power struggle that Yuna was too young to prevent.

That loss lit a fire in her

She vowed to protect the Akihara name at all costs and crush anyone who dared challenge them.
